output: Implemented batch 1 task T1 in `useClipResize.ts`. The hook now captures `to`/`speed`/`trackKind`/`assetDuration` at resize start, applies audio-specific endpoint clamping without mutating the resize callback input, recalculates visual clip speed from the overlap-resolved timeline span, and overwrites the resized visual clip’s overlap patch with speed-based metadata. Verified with the full `TimelineEditor.test.ts` and `resolve-overlaps.test.ts` modules, and wrote a batch checkpoint to `.megaplan/plans/fix-video-and-audio-clip-20260406-0616/execution_batch_1.json`.

task_updates.executor_notes: Updated `useClipResize` to cache source bounds/speed/track kind/asset duration at resize start, branch resize commit math by track kind, clamp audio endpoints without mutating the callback input, and recompute the resized visual clip patch from overlap-resolved action bounds before applying edits. Verified with the full `TimelineEditor.test.ts` and `resolve-overlaps.test.ts` modules.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Implemented the visual resize formulas against `resolvedRows`: right-edge speed is `(origin.to - origin.from) / resolvedDuration`, and left-edge uses `newFrom = origin.from + (resolvedStart - origin.start) * origin.speed` with `newSpeed = (origin.to - newFrom) / resolvedDuration`.
